hero.title: Building the Future of B2B with Artificial Intelligence.
hero.subtitle: Brivex is a technology innovation lab. We develop Edge AI hardware, SaaS infrastructures, and intelligent ecosystems for critical industries.

ecosystem.title: Our Ecosystem
ecosystem.subtitle: A constellation of ventures designed to transform critical industries through AI, IoT, and scalable SaaS architectures.

bioalert.name: Bio-Alert
bioalert.description: Acoustic IoT monitoring with Edge AI for the AgTech sector. Animal biometrics and behavioral prediction through neural sound processing.

axisops.name: AXIS.ops
axisops.description: Multi-tenant SaaS architecture for the comprehensive management of academies, studios, and learning centers. Operational intelligence at scale.

aleris.name: Aleris
aleris.description: Next-generation technology solution in stealth development. Pushing boundaries in automated data processing and predictive analytics.

brivexsaas.name: Brivex SaaS
brivexsaas.description: Scalable software infrastructure and real-time databases. The backbone that powers the entire Brivex ecosystem.

techDna.title: The Technological DNA
techDna.subtitle: We build with cutting-edge tools and frameworks to deliver solutions that perform at the edge of what's possible.

footer.form_subtitle: Have an idea or challenge? We'd love to hear about it.
